name: Nathaniel Garro
titles: Nathaniel Garro Knight-Errant, Former Captain of the Death Guard 7 th Battle Company, Hand of the Sigillite
lore: Though Nathaniel Garro served Mortarion with dedication during the Great Crusade, his unstinting loyalty to the Emperor was well known and so, alongside many of his brothers, he was marked to be eliminated at Isstvan III. Escaping this trap on the frigate Eisenstein, it was Garro’s warning to the Imperium that forced the Warmaster to abandon his shock invasion of the Throneworld and instead undertake a grinding advance. Having renounced his oaths to his Primarch, Garro bent the knee to the Sigillite, swearing to undertake whatever mission was called for, no matter how perilous, in the ultimate defence of humanity.
